description_long: This is a rugged, high-ankle hiking boot featuring a combination of dark gray and brown leather and synthetic materials. The boot has a reinforced toe cap, metal eyelets, and a padded collar and tongue for added comfort and support. The laces are thick and patterned, running through a series of hooks and eyelets for secure fastening. The side panels display a mix of stitched overlays and branding, while the heel area is robustly constructed for stability. The outsole is designed for traction, with a visible tread pattern suitable for outdoor terrain. The overall build suggests durability and protection for urban or trail environments.
description: A sturdy, high-ankle hiking boot in dark gray and brown with thick laces, metal eyelets, and a rugged, supportive design. The boot features reinforced areas and a treaded sole for durability and traction.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, reinforced heel, and brown overlay wrapping around the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown leather overlay, metal eyelets, and detailed stitching along the side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the patterned laces, reinforced toe cap, and visible branding on the tongue and toe.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar features to the left, showing the brown overlay, lacing system, and rugged sole.
attribute_logo: Oval-shaped logo on the tongue, white text on a dark background; small yellow 'Meindl' text on the toe.
